info.title: CourseLit REST API
info.description: OpenAPI documentation for the public CourseLit REST API surface.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Create and update users programmatically with an API key.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Create, read, update, and delete products through the public REST API.

tags.name: Product Payment Plans
tags.description: Manage payment plans for course and download products.

tags.name: Product Content
tags.description: Manage sections and lessons within a product.

tags.name: Product Customers
tags.description: Enroll customers and read enrollment/progress snapshots.

tags.name: Product Learner Actions
tags.description: Submit learner quiz evaluations and mark lessons complete.

tags.name: Media Uploads
tags.description: Generate MediaLit signatures for direct media uploads.

400.description: Bad request or user already exists.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter products matching any of the supplied tags. Pass as `tags=ai,beginner`.

400.description: Malformed JSON body, non-object body, or unsupported product field.

422.description: Payment plans could not be fetched.

example.name: Lifetime access
example.description: One-time payment for lifetime product access.

422.description: Payment plan could not be archived.

post.summary: Set the default product payment plan

422.description: Default plan could not be changed.

400.description: Unsupported section field or invalid drip configuration.

post.description: Creates a lesson. `text` lessons accept Tiptap/ProseMirror JSON in `content`; `embed` lessons accept `{ value }` in `content`; `quiz` lessons accept quiz JSON in `content`; media-backed lessons (`video`, `audio`, `pdf`, `file`) use `media`. SCORM lessons are not supported.

422.description: SCORM lessons are not supported, or lesson validation failed.

patch.description: Updates editable lesson fields. Lesson type and section cannot be changed after creation. Use the same content/media shapes documented on create. SCORM lesson updates are rejected with `not_supported`.

422.description: SCORM lessons are not supported, or lesson validation failed.

post.summary: Move a lesson to another section

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search customers by name or email.

post.description: Invites a customer by email. An invitation email is sent to the provided address.

400.description: Unsupported customer invitation field or missing email.

get.description: Returns customer progress details including completed lessons.

post.summary: Evaluate a quiz lesson for a product customer
post.description: Evaluates quiz answers for the target product customer using existing CourseLit learner runtime behavior. This records the evaluation result but does not mark the lesson complete.

post.summary: Mark a product customer lesson complete
post.description: Marks a lesson complete for the target product customer using existing CourseLit learner runtime behavior. Quiz lessons still require a passing evaluation first.

422.description: Lesson could not be marked complete.

post.description: Returns a short-lived upload signature and endpoint for direct file uploads. See `https://docs.medialit.cloud/api/uploadMedia` for the upload request format.

401.description: Invalid API key, or no active CourseLit dashboard session was found for the dashboard-only auth path.

403.description: The resolved school owner or logged-in dashboard user does not have `media:manage` permission.

apikey.description: Deprecated legacy API key transport. Prefer the `x-api-key` header.

email.description: Email address of the user to create.

permissions.description: Permissions to assign to the user.

subscribedToUpdates.description: Whether the user should be subscribed to marketing updates.

apikey.description: Deprecated legacy API key transport. Prefer the `x-api-key` header.

email.description: Email address of the user to update.

name.description: Updated display name for the user.

subscribedToUpdates.description: Updated marketing subscription preference for the user.

email.description: MD5 hash of the user email.

ErrorResponse.description: Error payload returned by the CourseLit user API. Depending on the code path, the message may appear in `message` or `error`.

message.description: Error message returned by validation and auth failures.

error.description: Error message returned by application-level failures.

PaymentPlanCreateRequest.description: Create a product-owned payment plan. `onetime` requires `oneTimeAmount`; `emi` requires `emiAmount` and `emiTotalInstallments`; `subscription` requires exactly one of `subscriptionMonthlyAmount` or `subscriptionYearlyAmount`.

name.description: Payment plan name shown to customers.

subscriptionMonthlyAmount.description: Use for monthly subscriptions. For `subscription`, provide exactly one subscription amount.

subscriptionYearlyAmount.description: Use for yearly subscriptions. For `subscription`, provide exactly one subscription amount.

name.description: Payment plan name shown to customers.

subscriptionMonthlyAmount.description: Use for monthly subscriptions. For `subscription`, provide exactly one subscription amount.

subscriptionYearlyAmount.description: Use for yearly subscriptions. For `subscription`, provide exactly one subscription amount.

ProductCreateRequest.description: Payload for creating a draft product. Send `title` and `type`. After creation, use the update endpoint for metadata, publish, and privacy changes.

type.description: CourseLit product type. Use `course` for lesson-based learning products.

ProductUpdateRequest.description: Payload for updating product metadata. A product must have at least one payment plan before it can be published.

description.description: Optional product/blog description. Send this as a JSON-stringified Tiptap/ProseMirror document, for example `JSON.stringify({ type: "doc", content: [] })`. Do not use a `content` field on this endpoint.

published.description: Whether the product is published. Existing CourseLit publishing checks still apply.

SectionCreateRequest.description: Payload for creating a section. Requires only `name`.

SectionUpdateRequest.description: Payload for updating a section. Supports updating `name` and scheduled release (`drip`) settings.

delayInMillis.description: Delay in milliseconds for `relative-date` drip. The input accepts a number interpreted as days (e.g. 3 = three days), but the value is persisted in millisecond equivalent (e.g. 259200000). The endpoint output always returns the stored millisecond value.

dateInUTC.description: UNIX timestamp in milliseconds for `exact-date` drip. Both input and output use millisecond precision.

TiptapDocument.description: Tiptap/ProseMirror document JSON used by `text` lessons. Supported nodes include `doc`, `paragraph`, `heading` (`level` 1, 2, or 3), `text`, `bulletList`, `orderedList`, `listItem`, `blockquote`, `horizontalRule`, `codeBlock`, `table`, `tableRow`, `tableHeader`, `tableCell`, `image`, and `hardBreak`. Supported marks include `bold`, `italic`, `underline`, `strike`, `code`, `link`, and `highlight`. An `image` node uses `attrs` with `src` (required), `alt` (optional), and `title` (optional).

EmbedContent.description: Embed content for `embed` lessons. The value can be a supported video URL or iframe/embed code, matching the dashboard Embed lesson field.

options.description: Answer options. Exactly one option should have `correctAnswer: true` for single-choice; multiple for multiple-choice.

correctAnswer.description: Whether this is the correct answer. Stripped from student-facing responses.

requiresPassingGrade.description: Whether a minimum score is required to pass.

LessonMedia.description: Media object used by `video`, `audio`, `pdf`, and `file` lessons. Use `/api/media/presigned` to upload to MediaLit first, then send the resulting media metadata here.

file.description: Public file URL when available. Private media may omit this field.

content.description: `text` lessons use `TiptapDocument`; `embed` lessons use `EmbedContent`; `quiz` lessons use `QuizContent`. Media-backed lessons (`video`, `audio`, `pdf`, `file`) use `media` instead of `content`.
`text` lessons use `TiptapDocument`; `embed` lessons use `EmbedContent`; `quiz` lessons use `QuizContent`. Media-backed lessons (`video`, `audio`, `pdf`, `file`) use `media` instead of `content`.
`text` lessons use `TiptapDocument`; `embed` lessons use `EmbedContent`; `quiz` lessons use `QuizContent`. Media-backed lessons (`video`, `audio`, `pdf`, `file`) use `media` instead of `content`.

ProductCustomer.description: Member enrollment details returned by the product customers endpoint.

answers.description: Quiz answers by question index. Each nested array contains selected option indexes for that question.

signature.description: MediaLit upload signature. Send this as the `x-medialit-signature` header to MediaLit.

endpoint.description: MediaLit server endpoint. Upload files directly to `${endpoint}/media/create` for multipart uploads or `${endpoint}/media/create/resumable` for TUS resumable uploads.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key created in CourseLit dashboard settings. The legacy `apikey` request-body field is still accepted but deprecated.
